name: primary_key
description: Stage identity: <site_id>|<iso_utc_timestamp>.

name: site_id
description: Per-row site/category identifier.

name: timestamp
description: UTC observation timestamp used with site_id as the stage identity key.

name: DateTime
description: Stage-1 timestamp preserved for downstream processing.

name: NEE
description: Net ecosystem exchange; source alias for co2_flux.

name: QC_NEE
description: QC class for NEE; source alias for qc_co2_flux.

name: Tair
description: Air temperature in degrees C; source alias for air_temperature.

name: USTAR
description: Friction velocity; source alias for u_star or legacy u.

name: VPD
description: Vapor pressure deficit.

name: Rg
description: Incoming shortwave radiation; source alias for SWIN_1_1_1.

name: P_RAIN
description: Precipitation; source alias for P_RAIN_1_1_1.

name: rH
description: Canonical source relative humidity column after M31 BigQuery-case-insensitive humidity handling.

name: rH_norm_s
description: Derived/normalized silver humidity column when it diverges from source rH.

name: H
description: Sensible heat flux preserved from source/silver.

name: qc_H
description: QC class for H when present.

name: LE
description: Latent heat flux preserved from source/silver.

name: qc_LE
description: QC class for LE when present.

name: filename
description: Optional source pass-through when present.

name: DOY
description: Optional source pass-through when present.

name: daytime
description: Optional source pass-through when present.
